items.title: Jim Cramer on International Business Machines: “Inexpensive Stock Even Here”
items.description: International Business Machines Corporation (NYSE:IBM) is one of the stocks that Jim Cramer shared takes on, along with navigating market shortages. Cramer noted that the company reported a “magnificent number,” as he stated: Beyond the Mag Seven, let me throw in IBM. They reported a magnificent number. Oh my God, Mag Eight? I don’t know. […]

items.title: This 'Outdated' IBM Technology Just Did Something It Hasn't Done in 20 Years
Californian tech company to move headquarters to Florida
items.description: D-Wave Quantum Inc. said it will relocate its headquarters to Boca Raton, Fla., before the end of the year.

items.title: Amazon’s layoffs are staggering. We’ve seen this before
items.description: Big Tech continues to wrestle with mass layoffs, most recently with Amazon’s announcement of 16,000 job cuts. It’s a trend that started long before the AI race: organizational change brought by the arrival of new technology.

items.title: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Microsoft, Meta, UnitedHealth — And Warsh Pick Jolts Markets
items.description: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.
